title: ayenia angulata
intro: Ayenia angulata is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ayenia angulata include relief from diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Ayenia angulata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, typically by steeping the leaves in hot water, to utilize its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
